info.title: Operator OS API
info.description: Operator OS is an ultra-lightweight AI agent framework. This API provides endpoints for user management, agent configuration, billing, integrations, and administration.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: User registration, login, and token management

tags.name: Integration Management
tags.description: Connect, disconnect, and manage user integrations

tags.name: GDPR
tags.description: GDPR data subject rights (export, erasure, retention)

tags.name: User
tags.description: User profile, settings, and API key management

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Chat session management and message history

tags.name: Beta
tags.description: Beta program management (invites, feature flags, waitlist)

409.description: Token already used or email already verified

200.description: Verification email sent (returns 200 even for nonexistent emails for anti-enumeration)

post.description: Receives Stripe webhook events. Verifies signature using Stripe-Signature header.

parameters.name: Stripe-Signature
parameters.description: Stripe webhook signature for HMAC-SHA256 verification

get.summary: Get usage summary for current billing period

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to look back

get.summary: Get current usage vs plan limits

post.summary: Connect an integration (OAuth, API key, or no-auth)

get.summary: List all user integration statuses with token health

400.description: Not an OAuth integration or invalid state

post.description: Irreversible. Requires confirm:true in request body.

get.summary: Get data subject request by ID

delete.summary: Cancel a pending data subject request

get.description: Always returns 200. Used by Kubernetes liveness probes.
Returns 200 if all critical components are healthy, 503 otherwise.
Upgrades to WebSocket protocol for real-time bidirectional communication with agents.
